user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new question with options, answer, location and topic, so that orientation evaluations can assess new hires' understanding
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Question Bank screen; When I click Add new question and enter the question, options, answer, location and topic; Then the new question is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view questions in a list showing question, locations, options, answer and topics, so that I can review the orientation question bank
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Question Bank screen; When the page loads; Then questions are listed with all configured columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing question, so that I can correct wording, options or the correct answer
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Question Bank screen; When I click Edit on a question row; Then I can modify and save the question details

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to define the answer options and mark the correct answer for a question, so that evaluations are scored accurately
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a question; When I enter the options and select the correct answer; Then the options and answer are saved with the question

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to associate each question with a topic and location, so that the right questions appear in the relevant orientation evaluation
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a question; When I select a topic and location; Then the associations are saved with the question

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to preview the questionnaire, so that I can verify how the evaluation appears to new hires before it goes live
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Question Bank screen; When I click Preview questionnaire; Then the assembled questionnaire is displayed for review

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through, refresh, and proceed or cancel from the Question Bank, so that I can navigate all questions and continue the setup flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Question Bank screen; When I use the paging controls, Refresh, Next or Cancel; Then the list navigates or reloads, I advance, or I exit without saving
